prompt: Next.jsでSaaSの管理ダッシュボードを作りたい。shadcn/uiとTailwindを使って、ダークモード対応で、売上チャートとユーザー一覧テーブルがあるメイン画面を1つのReactコンポーネントとして作って。かっこいい感じにして！

assertions.name: uses-lucide-icons
assertions.description: Uses Lucide React icons instead of emojis for UI elements

assertions.name: dark-mode-support
assertions.description: Implements dark mode with proper dark: Tailwind classes or CSS variables

assertions.name: includes-chart
assertions.description: Contains a sales/revenue chart component (Recharts or similar)

assertions.name: includes-table
assertions.description: Contains a user list table component

assertions.name: color-palette-defined
assertions.description: Has a defined, cohesive color palette (not random colors)

assertions.name: no-emoji-icons
assertions.description: Does not use emoji characters as functional UI icons

assertions.name: responsive-design
assertions.description: Has responsive breakpoints or responsive Tailwind classes
